title: Safetensors + GGUF weight loaders
description:
Implement weight loading from safetensors and GGUF formats with weight name mapping.

src/weight_loading/safetensors.rs:
- Parse safetensors: JSON header (names, shapes, dtypes, offsets) + binary data
- Memory-map file for zero-copy access
- Support dtypes: f32, f16, bf16 (convert f16/bf16 → f32 on load)
- Return HashMap<String, Tensor>

src/weight_loading/gguf.rs:
- Parse GGUF: metadata KV pairs + tensor info + binary data
- Support: F32, F16, Q8_0 (dequantize to f32)
- Return HashMap<String, Tensor>

src/weight_loading/weight_map.rs:
- WeightMapper: maps HF names → Synapse paths via pattern rules
- Qwen3 mapping: model.layers.{i}.self_attn.q_proj.weight → layers[i].attention.w_q, etc.
- Validation: zero missing, zero unexpected keys

src/weight_loading/converter.rs:
- bf16→f32, f16→f32 conversion
- Transpose weight matrices if layout differs

src/weight_loading/mod.rs: re-exports

Tests (mandatory):
- Create small safetensors file (2 tensors), load, verify values bit-exact
- Create small GGUF file (2 tensors), load, verify within 1e-4
- Weight mapper: Qwen3 mapping resolves all keys
- Missing key → error, extra key → warning
- bf16→f32 within 1e-3

Pass/fail:
- Safetensors bit-exact
- GGUF within 1e-4
- Zero missing/unexpected keys for Qwen3
- Correct dtype conversion
